PHP Worker Calculator
GitHub

Open source · Client-side · No data leaves your browser

How many PHP workers do you need?

Enter your website URL. We auto-detect your tech stack and calculate the exact number of PHP workers required — no guesswork.

https://

Respects robots.txt. No aggressive scanning. All analysis runs in your browser.

01

Enter URL

Paste your domain. We scan DNS, detect CMS, plugins, caching, and performance metrics.

02

Review detection

We show exactly what we found and what we couldn't. DNS always works; page fetching may be blocked by CORS.

03

Enter traffic & calculate

Fill in your real traffic numbers. We calculate instantly in your browser.

MIT License. No data leaves your browser.

GitHub·Built with Next.js
